transcript:
[Meeting date: 2026-08-17]
[00:00] You: Budget cycle planning. Fiscal year end is December 31st.
[00:40] Speaker 1: We need to submit department budget requests for next year by October 15th. After that goes to finance review, which takes two weeks, so final approval is around October 29th.
[01:25] Speaker 2: The Board needs to approve the final annual budget. That board meeting is November 19th.
[02:00] Speaker 3: The hiring plan needs to be baked into the budget request. I'll have the org chart and headcount plan ready by October 1st.
[02:40] You: Good. What about capital expenditures?
[02:55] Speaker 1: CapEx requests go through a separate approval process. I'll submit our hardware and infrastructure CapEx requests by September 30th — that's a firm deadline for CapEx.
[03:35] Speaker 2: We should also have the Q3 actuals finalized before we start forecasting. Q3 books close on September 30th, but it takes a week for consolidation, so we'll have clean Q3 data by October 7th.
[04:15] Speaker 3: The annual headcount freeze — where no new hires can be initiated without special approval — starts December 1st as we get into year-end.
[04:50] You: And we should plan for the mid-year bonus payout. That's typically end of September, but HR hasn't confirmed the exact date yet.
[05:20] Speaker 1: I'll check with HR and get the bonus payout date confirmed. I'll have an answer by August 19th.
[05:45] Speaker 2: One more thing — the 2027 planning kickoff meeting should happen in late November, probably around November 15th, but we haven't scheduled it yet.

action_items.description: Prepare org chart and headcount plan for budget request
action_items.source_quote: I'll have the org chart and headcount plan ready by October 1st.

action_items.description: Submit hardware and infrastructure CapEx requests
action_items.source_quote: I'll submit our hardware and infrastructure CapEx requests by September 30th — that's a firm deadline for CapEx.

action_items.description: Confirm mid-year bonus payout date with HR
action_items.source_quote: I'll check with HR and get the bonus payout date confirmed. I'll have an answer by August 19th.

decisions: Budget requests due October 15th; Board approval November 19th
